scope: Verify prior critical/high BLOCK findings after fix; residual medium/low carried forward

COR-001.evidence: packages/cli/src/commands/doctor.ts:25 imports assessFirstHit; probe branch line 223 calls it; behavioral test doctor.test.ts:859 asserts JSON ok/first_hit + no fix pipeline

COR-002.evidence: doctor-body-altitude.ts:32 extractBody(entry.body) then assessBodyAltitude; proxyBody removed; doctor-body-altitude.test.ts covers body-vs-description

COR-003.evidence: command-signposts.ts:18-20 successor 'fabric info scope'; command-signposts.test.ts locks not store list

SEC-001.evidence: cross-store-write.ts:48-52 pasteSafeScope via SCOPE_COORDINATE_PATTERN; actionHint interpolates safeScope; test rejects newline/shell injection

ARCH-004.evidence: fabric-config.ts:412 altitude_propose_gate schema default false; extract-knowledge.ts:96-104 loadProjectConfig path; env override kept; ad-hoc JSON.parse removed; fabric-config + extract-knowledge tests

BP-002.evidence: doctor.test.ts:859-917 probe emits JSON first_hit, never runDoctorReport/Fix/ApplyLint

BP-003.evidence: remediationLinesFor exported; first-hit.test.ts:357-381 asserts pasteable CLI lines + assessFirstHitSync remediations (not source grep)

BP-011.evidence: doctor-body-altitude.test.ts now covers createBodyAltitudeDumpCheck + inspectBodyAltitude body path

SEC-003.evidence: ad-hoc JSON.parse altitude path removed; gate via schema/loadProjectConfig

findings.title: transcript_header altitude rule ignores H2 structure
findings.snippet: if (hasTranscriptHeader && turnMarkers >= 2) { return { ok: false, code: "body_altitude_transcript_shape" } }
findings.description: Unlike turnMarkers>=3 (requires h2Count===0), transcript-header + 2 markers always fails even for structured ## guidelines that document dump anti-patterns.
findings.impact: False positives under FABRIC_ALTITUDE_PROPOSE_GATE=1 on legitimate guidelines.

findings.title: Altitude hard-gate refuse omits structured warnings
findings.description: Refuse path returns empty pending_path without warnings[]; warn path attaches code/detail/action_hint.
findings.impact: Clients cannot distinguish altitude refuse from other empty-pending failures.
findings.suggestion: Return warnings on refuse path as well.

findings.title: empty_store remediation emits non-pasteable / duplicate lines
findings.snippet: writeTarget ? `(write target: ${writeTarget})` : "fabric store bind <remote...>", "fabric store bind <remote...>"
findings.description: When writeTarget set, second line is parenthetical not CLI; when null, bind duplicated.
findings.suggestion: Emit unique executable lines only; put write target in message.

findings.title: inspectBodyAltitude swallows failures as clean ok
findings.description: Any throw returns empty entries → createBodyAltitudeDumpCheck status ok.
findings.impact: Doctor false-green when inspection never ran.

findings.title: Warn-and-still-write altitude emits archive-attempted failure event
findings.description: Default warn mode still writes pending and later knowledge_proposed, but first records archive_attempted like hard refuses.
findings.impact: Incorrect archive attempt metrics for successful proposes.
findings.suggestion: Emit archive_attempted only on hard refuse; warn mode use warnings only.

findings.title: inspectBodyAltitude re-walks full corpus instead of reusing doctor hygiene pass
findings.description: Separate collectStoreCanonicalEntries from doctor hygiene corpus.
findings.impact: Extra CPU/alloc on every doctor report scaling with corpus size.
findings.suggestion: Pass existing hygiene corpus into inspectBodyAltitude.

findings.title: doctor --probe double first-hit + full storeDoctorChecks
findings.snippet: const firstHit = await assessFirstHit(...); stores = storeDoctorChecks(...);
findings.description: Probe still runs assessFirstHit plus storeDoctorChecks tree walks.
findings.impact: Probe latency grows with store trees.
findings.suggestion: Probe: only assessFirstHit; keep full checks on normal doctor.

findings.title: doctor --probe hidden from --help
findings.description: Readiness surface hidden with internal/debug flags.
findings.suggestion: Move probe into EXPOSED_FLAGS unless quarantine is intentional and documented.

findings.title: relevance_paths_drift actionHint appends English hardcode after i18n
findings.suggestion: Add {sample} placeholder to en/zh remediation keys.

findings.title: Signpost tests do not lock against allCommands silent aliases
findings.description: Test only checks table membership, not absence from allCommands.
findings.impact: Re-adding silent aliases would not fail CI.
findings.suggestion: Assert intersection of allCommands keys and retired names is empty.

findings.title: Altitude heuristics live inside extract-knowledge write module
findings.description: Doctor still imports propose-path module for pure heuristics.
findings.suggestion: Move assessBodyAltitude to pure body-altitude.ts shared by both.

findings.title: doctor --probe dumps unredacted paths unlike --debug-bundle
findings.description: Probe serializes full first-hit paths without redactSecrets.
findings.impact: Local FS layout can leak into CI logs/support tickets.
findings.suggestion: Redact paths or document probe as local-only.

findings.title: assessBodyAltitude type parameter intentionally unused
findings.description: Type arg discarded despite API surface.
findings.suggestion: Remove type arg or implement type-aware rules.

findings.title: Signpost note strings English-only after i18n message
findings.description: formatSignpostMessage appends English note after localized template.
findings.suggestion: Drop notes or i18n note keys.

verdict_rationale: All 7 prior critical/high findings verified fixed with source + test evidence (151 related tests green). No new critical/high introduced. Residual 11 medium + 2 low are non-blocking polish/perf/i18n; empty_store pasteable parenthetical (COR-006) and probe path redaction (SEC-002) remain the most user-visible mediums.
notes: Ralph session paused; re-review executed directly per dispatch fallback.
ARCH-004 residual documented: altitude_propose_gate not on fabric config TUI (power-user JSON/env only) — accepted.
Prior positive PERF-006 (no Stop-hook flood) still holds; not re-listed as open finding.
next_steps: Optional follow-up for mediums: COR-006 pasteable empty_store, COR-004/005 altitude edge cases, PERF-003 probe slimming
Proceed quality-test / merge path with residual medium caveats
